ab: Taskun azak takna tama munhaan inaak tu pantama’un tantungu.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Tupa’un azam istaa tu, haiza ihaan tavi mubuat tu luak.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Maaq tu minkangna naipa tavi qai, misnahaan tavi mutingkul pananastu.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Madas tama ki maiqanvang tu titi siin saviki isaiv inaak tu pantama’un.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Muskun azak pantama’un ihaan sapalan pababazbaz, taqu naipa madia paliqabasan tu sintataqu.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Maaq tu namudaanin azak qai, tumasqingun azak pantama’un tu malaungkavin, talmainduu’in amin sadu’an.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Tupa azak tu, “Maaki mindaduu’in pantama’un tu bantas a, munhaana amin inaam tu lumaq tantungu ki muqnin.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
